scope: Tracer bullet integration test: text-complete hook → consolidated writer

evidence.root_cause: src/hooks/text-complete-handler.ts exports createTextCompleteHandler (factory), not handleTextComplete (standalone function). The integration path does not exist yet.

analysis.what_fails: The test imports handleTextComplete from src/hooks/text-complete-handler.js. This named export does not exist. The module exports createTextCompleteHandler which returns a closure (input, output) => Promise<void>.
analysis.what_would_make_it_pass: Either: (1) Export a handleTextComplete(input, output, projectRoot) function from the handler that internally uses initSession + addTurn from consolidated-writer, writing to .hivemind/sessions/{sdkSessionId}.json, or (2) Create a new integration adapter that bridges the factory pattern to the standalone function interface.
analysis.integration_gap: The handler currently passes `directory` (project root) directly to consolidated-writer functions. The consolidated writer writes to `{directory}/{generatedId}.json`. The desired behavior is writing to `{projectRoot}/.hivemind/sessions/{sdkSessionId}.json` — meaning the session directory path needs to be constructed using the shared paths module.
analysis.session_file_path_mismatch: Consolidated writer gets projectRoot as sessionDir and writes {projectRoot}/{generatedId}.json. Expected: {projectRoot}/.hivemind/sessions/{sdkSessionId}.json

recommended_next_action: Implement handleTextComplete export in src/hooks/text-complete-handler.ts that accepts (input, output, projectRoot) and writes consolidated session file to .hivemind/sessions/{sessionId}.json using the shared paths module.
